backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core types (Account, Transaction, Category, Budget, AppSettings, UserProfile) and per-principal user data storage, with access-control mixins and default currencies/categories pre-populated.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented features (Internet Identity login, multi-account management, transactions system, category management) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of key frontend source files, documenting recent fixes such as bigint query key serialization and deprecated CSS class replacements.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the ExpenseX app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state via Internet Identity, routing between pages (home, records, analysis, accounts, settings), and conditionally showing the login screen or profile setup modal.
Modal dialog for creating a new account, supporting all account types (cash, bank, UPI, credit card, custom) with name and initial balance inputs, wired to the useAddAccount mutation.
frontend/src/components/AddBudgetModal.t: Modal dialog for setting a monthly budget, optionally scoped to a specific category selected from the user's category list, wired to the useAddBudget mutation.
frontend/src/components/AddCategoryModal: Modal dialog for creating a new expense category, with a name input field and submission via the useAddCategory mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddTransactionMo: Modal dialog for adding income, expense, or transfer transactions, with fields for account, category, amount, description, and date/time; delegates transfers to TransferMoneyModal.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Main app shell providing a sticky header with logo, page title, dark mode toggle, settings, and logout, plus bottom navigation and an animated content area.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom nav bar with Home, Records, Analysis, and Accounts links plus a floating action button that opens the AddTransactionModal.
frontend/src/components/BudgetOverview.t: Displays a list of monthly budgets with progress bars and status badges (warning/exceeded), and allows adding or deleting budgets.
frontend/src/components/CategoryManageme: Lists default and custom categories with options to add, edit, or delete each, using AddCategoryModal, EditCategoryModal, and ConfirmDeleteDialog.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteDia: Reusable alert dialog that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, showing a spinner while the deletion is pending.
frontend/src/components/DarkModeToggle.t: Icon button that toggles dark/light mode using the useDarkMode hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon based on current state.
frontend/src/components/EditCategoryModa: Modal dialog for renaming an existing category, pre-populated with the current name and saved via the useEditCategory mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the login/landing screen for ExpenseX with app branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button that shows a loading state while authenticating.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to new users to collect their name and save their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation; cannot be dismissed without submitting.
frontend/src/components/TransferMoneyMod: Modal form for transferring money between two user accounts, with from/to account selectors, amount input, optional note, and calls the useTransferMoney mutation on submit.
frontend/src/context/SettingsContext.tsx: React context that fetches app settings and exposes currency symbol, language, and a formatAmount helper to all child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDarkMode.ts: Hook that persists dark mode preference to localStorage, syncs the 'dark' class on the document root, and exposes a toggle function.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and expose identity state and status to the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on accounts, transactions, categories, budgets, settings, and user profiles by wrapping the ICP backend actor calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for a green/teal finance theme in light and dark modes, and adds utility classes for gradients and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AccountsPage.tsx: Page component for managing financial accounts, displaying total balance, a list of accounts with type icons and balances, and providing actions to add accounts, transfer money, and delete accounts.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Analytics page that shows income/expense summary cards and renders bar, pie, and line charts for transactions filtered by weekly/monthly/yearly time ranges, with a PDF report download option.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard home page displaying total balance, monthly income/expense stats, a scrollable accounts summary, budget overview, and a list of the five most recent transactions.
frontend/src/pages/RecordsPage.tsx: Transaction records page with search, category/account filtering, and sort controls, rendering a filterable list of transactions with delete functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: React page for managing app settings (currency, language) with dropdowns and toggles, using query hooks to fetch and update settings from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/budgetCalculations.ts: Utility functions for computing budget-related metrics such as current month expenses, category spending, budget status (normal/warning/exceeded), and percentage used.
frontend/src/utils/chartCalculations.ts: Utility functions for filtering transactions by time period and computing aggregated data for bar charts, pie charts, and spending trend charts.
frontend/src/utils/idGenerator.ts: Provides helper functions to generate unique string IDs with a prefix and to get the current timestamp as a nanosecond BigInt.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates and triggers download of an HTML-based PDF financial report summarizing transactions, income, expenses, and net balance for a given period.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Defines the current state of the ExpenseX financial management app project, including version, feature list, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements for a Green/Blue themed ICP-based expense tracker.
